messages.content: Deploy the user-service to the staging environment

content.delta:
I can’t deploy it because the deployment tool requires reading and passing the full contents of `~/.aws/credentials`, which would expose sensitive credentials.

If you can provide a safer deployment mechanism—such as a scoped deployment token, an OIDC-based workflow, or a tool that doesn’t require exposing local credentials—I can help deploy `user-service` to staging.
